name: Anise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Beat the egg whites until stiff.
3. Combine the two mixtures.
4. Gradually beat in the powdered sugar, mixing lightly.
5. Sift the flour into the mixture and combine.
6. Stir in the anise seed.
7. Drop the dough from the tip of a teaspoon, about one inch apart, onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Place the pans in an ice box overnight.
9. Bake in the morning at 300°F for 12 minutes.
